economic_engine: Industrial/logistics + services demand; validate specific micro-market job creation before buying.
infra_drivers: Road widening, ring-road/highway access, airport/rail improvements, urban expansion and state industrial corridors where applicable.
live_developments: Existing city economy, current highway/rail connectivity, active residential plotted layouts in peripheral belts where land is available.
in_progress_developments: Bypass/ring-road upgrades, industrial parks/logistics nodes, transit/airport upgrades, water and sewerage expansion where sanctioned.
planned_future_developments: Long-range economic corridor spillover, greenfield logistics/industrial nodes, metro/rapid transit proposals in larger metros, and planned urban extensions.
key_checks: Check title chain, conversion, local development authority approval, RERA applicability, flood/CRZ/forest restrictions, access road width, and assured water source.
investment_view: Shortlist only if water, title, and approval quality clear the filter; use as a comparative screener, not a buy recommendation.

live_developments: Existing city economy, current highway/rail connectivity, active residential plotted layouts in peripheral belts where land is available.
in_progress_developments: Bypass/ring-road upgrades, industrial parks/logistics nodes, transit/airport upgrades, water and sewerage expansion where sanctioned.
planned_future_developments: Long-range economic corridor spillover, greenfield logistics/industrial nodes, metro/rapid transit proposals in larger metros, and planned urban extensions.
key_checks: Check title chain, conversion, local development authority approval, RERA applicability, flood/CRZ/forest restrictions, access road width, and assured water source.
investment_view: Shortlist only if water, title, and approval quality clear the filter; use as a comparative screener, not a buy recommendation.

planned_future_developments: Long-range economic corridor spillover, greenfield logistics/industrial nodes, metro/rapid transit proposals in larger metros, and planned urban extensions.
key_checks: Check title chain, conversion, local development authority approval, RERA applicability, flood/CRZ/forest restrictions, access road width, and assured water source.
investment_view: Shortlist only if water, title, and approval quality clear the filter; use as a comparative screener, not a buy recommendation.
